actions.code: (() => { const page = Number('{{page}}' || '1'); return page <= 1 ? '{{baseUrl}}/' : '{{baseUrl}}/?page=' + page; })();

(() => { const mangas = []; const items = document.querySelectorAll('.mainleft .leftp > a'); items.forEach((item) => { const img = item.querySelector('img'); const href = item.getAttribute('href') || ''; const title = (img?.getAttribute('title') || img?.getAttribute('alt') || item.textContent || '').trim(); const cover = img?.getAttribute('data-original') || img?.getAttribute('data-lazy-src') || img?.getAttribute('data-src') || img?.getAttribute('src') || ''; const id = href.replace(/^https?:\/\/(www\.)?everiaclub\.com/i, '').replace(/^\//, '').replace(/\/$/, ''); if (title && id) { mangas.push({ id: id, title: title, cover: cover }); } }); return JSON.stringify(mangas); })();

(() => { const page = Number('{{page}}' || '1'); const keyword = encodeURIComponent('{{searchKeyword}}'); return page <= 1 ? '{{baseUrl}}/search.php?keyword=' + keyword : '{{baseUrl}}/search.php?keyword=' + keyword + '&page=' + page; })();

(() => { const mangas = []; const items = document.querySelectorAll('.mainleft .leftp > a'); items.forEach((item) => { const img = item.querySelector('img'); const href = item.getAttribute('href') || ''; const title = (img?.getAttribute('title') || img?.getAttribute('alt') || item.textContent || '').trim(); const cover = img?.getAttribute('data-original') || img?.getAttribute('data-lazy-src') || img?.getAttribute('data-src') || img?.getAttribute('src') || ''; const id = href.replace(/^https?:\/\/(www\.)?everiaclub\.com/i, '').replace(/^\//, '').replace(/\/$/, ''); if (title && id) { mangas.push({ id: id, title: title, cover: cover }); } }); return JSON.stringify(mangas); })();
(() => { const mangaId = '{{mangaId}}'.replace(/^\/+/, '').replace(/\/+$/, ''); const encoded = encodeURI(decodeURIComponent(mangaId)); return '{{baseUrl}}/' + encoded; })();
actions.description: Build the gallery detail URL (properly encoded)
Wait for gallery images with data-original

actions.code: (() => { const titleNode = document.querySelector('.mainleft h1, .mainleft .title, .mainleft .article-title, h1'); const rawTitle = (titleNode?.textContent || '').trim(); const title = rawTitle || document.title.replace(/\s*-\s*Everia\s*Club\s*$/i, '').trim(); const tags = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div.end a > p.tags, div.end .tags')).map((el) => (el.textContent || '').trim()).filter(Boolean); const coverNode = document.querySelector('.mainleft > img[data-original]'); const cover = coverNode ? (coverNode.getAttribute('data-original') || coverNode.getAttribute('data-lazy-src') || coverNode.getAttribute('data-src') || coverNode.getAttribute('src') || '') : ''; return JSON.stringify({ title: title, cover: cover, author: '', status: 'completed', description: title, genre: tags.join(', ') }); })();
(() => { const mangaId = '{{mangaId}}'.replace(/^\/+/, '').replace(/\/+$/, ''); const encoded = encodeURI(decodeURIComponent(mangaId)); return '{{baseUrl}}/' + encoded; })();

actions.description: Wait for gallery images with data-original

actions.code: (() => { const href = (document.querySelector('link[rel="canonical"]')?.getAttribute('href') || window.location.href || '').trim(); const id = href.replace(/^https?:\/\/(www\.)?everiaclub\.com/i, '').replace(/^\//, '').replace(/\/$/, ''); const match = href.match(/\d{4}\/\d{2}\/\d{2}/); const publishTime = match ? match[0].replace(/\//g, '-') : ''; return JSON.stringify([{ id: id, title: 'Gallery', publishTime: publishTime }]); })();
(() => { const chapterId = '{{chapterId}}'.replace(/^\/+/, '').replace(/\/+$/, ''); const encoded = encodeURI(decodeURIComponent(chapterId)); return '{{baseUrl}}/' + encoded; })();
actions.description: Build the gallery page URL (properly encoded)
Wait for gallery images with data-original attribute

actions.code: (() => { const pages = []; const mainleft = document.querySelector('.mainleft'); if (!mainleft) { return JSON.stringify(pages); } const directImgs = mainleft.querySelectorAll(':scope > img[data-original]'); directImgs.forEach((img, index) => { const url = img.getAttribute('data-original') || img.getAttribute('data-lazy-src') || img.getAttribute('data-src') || ''; if (url && !url.includes('data:image') && !url.includes('loading') && !url.includes('placeholder') && url !== '/static/loading.jpg') { pages.push({ index: index, url: url }); } }); return JSON.stringify(pages); })();

(() => { const page = Number('{{page}}' || '1'); const category = '{{category}}'.trim(); if (!category) { return page <= 1 ? '{{baseUrl}}/' : '{{baseUrl}}/?page=' + page; } const path = '{{baseUrl}}/' + category + '.html'; return page <= 1 ? path : path + '?page=' + page; })();

(() => { const mangas = []; const items = document.querySelectorAll('.mainleft .leftp > a'); items.forEach((item) => { const img = item.querySelector('img'); const href = item.getAttribute('href') || ''; const title = (img?.getAttribute('title') || img?.getAttribute('alt') || item.textContent || '').trim(); const cover = img?.getAttribute('data-original') || img?.getAttribute('data-lazy-src') || img?.getAttribute('data-src') || img?.getAttribute('src') || ''; const id = href.replace(/^https?:\/\/(www\.)?everiaclub\.com/i, '').replace(/^\//, '').replace(/\/$/, ''); if (title && id) { mangas.push({ id: id, title: title, cover: cover }); } }); return JSON.stringify(mangas); })();

changes: Add URL encoding for getMangaDetail and getChapterList (encodeURI+decodeURIComponent)
Remove broken wait condition 'load' from getPageList (caused 15s timeouts)
Add waitAfterLoad=2000 to all navigate actions for reliable page load
Use '.mainleft > img[data-original]' selector for more reliable image detection
Simplify getPageList extraction to return plain page array
Add URL encoding fix for getPageList (encodeURI+decodeURIComponent)
Add diagnostic info to getPageList extraction script
